violations.text: A splash guard is needed between the hand sink and mop sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The condensate from the HVAC unit is draining into a bay of 3-bay sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The bar is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
The threshold to the kitchen and walk-in cooler was not in good repair. Exposed wood and sheetrock exposed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2026
The establishment is lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
